title: Industrial Production, Iran, 1954/55-1958/59 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 6, page 41) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image. The image was clean and unambiguous throughout; cross-checked against the raw pdftotext extraction, which was also largely legible for this page. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 6, page 41, source: Ministry of Industries and Mines, Teheran. Two cells are blank by design, matching the source: Glass 1954/55 was printed as a dash ('-', i.e. no/negligible production that year) and Soft drinks 1954/55 was printed as 'n.a.' (not available) — both left blank here rather than coded as zero, per project convention of not fabricating values. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
